_Comment_ASPNETCORE_FORWARDEDHEADERS: Set to 'true' for Docker/container deployments to enable X-Forwarded-Host and X-Forwarded-Prefix headers (required when behind a reverse proxy like Azure App Service)

BlobStorage._Comment: Unified blob storage configuration. Provider: 'Local' for filesystem, 'Azure' for Azure Blob Storage. Environment variable overrides: BlobStorage__Provider, BlobStorage__UseManagedIdentity, etc.

DurableTask._Comment: DurableTask orchestration backend: 'FileSystem' for dev, 'AzureStorage' for cloud. Concurrency is controlled via: (1) MaxConcurrentFiles in Import section limits files per orchestration, (2) ConsumerCount limits threads per file.

AzureStorage._Comment: Azure Storage backend for orchestration state. Supports both connection string and Managed Identity authentication.

Tenants._Comment_Mode: Controls multi-tenancy behavior. 'Isolated' = multiple customers with separate data stores (SaaS). 'Distributed' = single customer with horizontal sharding (NOT YET IMPLEMENTED - Phase 20.2+)
Tenants._Comment_Configurations: Array of tenant configurations. TenantId 0 is RESERVED for system operations (transaction IDs). Regular tenants start at TenantId 1+

Configurations._Comment: System Partition - Reserved for transaction IDs. Shares database with Tenant 1.

TransactionWatcher._Comment: Automatically commits stalled transactions. Scans all active tenants periodically.

Import._Comment: FHIR bulk import concurrency and performance tuning. Controls thread pool usage to prevent request timeouts during imports.
Import._Comment_MaxConcurrentFiles: Maximum number of input files to process concurrently (default: 2). Prevents thread pool starvation by limiting nested Task.Run() creation from StreamingImportFileActivity. Each activity spawns 1 producer + ConsumerCount worker threads.
Import._Comment_ConsumerCount: Number of consumer threads per file (default: 8). Each consumer reads from the channel and writes batches to the database. Total threads per activity = 1 producer + ConsumerCount consumers.
Import._Comment_BatchSize: Resources per batch write (default: 100). Consumers accumulate this many resources before calling BatchWriteAsync. Larger batches = better throughput, smaller batches = lower latency.
Import._Comment_ChannelCapacity: Channel capacity between producer and consumers (default: 1000). Provides backpressure: producer waits if channel is full. Prevents memory exhaustion from unbounded resource queues.

Mcp._Comment: Model Context Protocol (MCP) integration for AI-accessible FHIR operations. Set Enabled to false to disable MCP endpoints and services.
